case_title: ROBERT COMPTON ET AL VS. SAGE VETERINARY CENTERS, L.P.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFFS ROBERT COMPTON AND NICOLE GRANT ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAGE VETERINARY CENTERS, L.P. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL LEVENSON (MEDICAL DIRECTOR). PLAINTIFFS' EXHIBITS RETAINED, AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY COMPTON, ROBERT GRANT, NICOLE AS TO DEFENDANT SAGE VETERINARY CENTERS, L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MICHAEL LEVENSON (MEDICAL DIRECTOR) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAGE VETERINARY CENTERS, L.P.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2023 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER FILED BY COMPTON, ROBERT GRANT, NICOLE SAGE VETERINARY CENTERS, L.P.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $395. SERVED AUG-22-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAGE VETERINARY CENTERS, L.P.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMPTON, ROBERT GRANT, NICOLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAGE VETERINARY CENTERS, L.P. $3,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $470.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,570.00, DEFENDANT'S USE OF A 25G NEEDLE TO TEST PET'S BLADDER DID CAUSE HER PREMATURE DEATH FROM SEPTIC SHOCK. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
